criterion_description: Does the option increase safe upstream capacity?
Does it reduce avoidable ED, ambulance and hospital flow?
Does access improve without worsening inequity?
Does it protect local care, not just telehealth?
Is the model affordable and controllable?
Does it avoid opportunistic or low-value activity?
Does it lower transaction costs and entry barriers?
Are scope, prescribing, audit and safety controls strong?
Can the option survive contestation?
Can outcomes be measured and managed?
